summary: Completed comprehensive testing of bulk audit feature and existing functionality. All bulk audit requirements verified working correctly.

minor_bugs.issue: One test failed due to duplicate invoice detection (expected behavior)

design_issues.issue: HTML validation warnings about span elements inside tbody

passed_tests: POST /api/audit/run-bulk with provider that has no contract returns 404
POST /api/audit/run-bulk with provider that has no pending invoices returns 404
POST /api/audit/run-bulk with valid provider+contract+pending invoices completes successfully
Bulk audit marks all processed invoices as audited=true
Bulk Audit by Provider card displays correctly with Layers icon
Provider dropdown shows pending invoice counts per provider
Selecting a provider shows pending count and contract name
Button disabled when no pending invoices or no contract for selected provider
Bulk audit results display after completion
Existing single audit functionality still works
Existing delete audit run functionality still works
All pages load correctly: Dashboard, Upload, Invoices, Contracts, Manual Upload
All navigation between pages working correctly
